enableDynamicFilterPushdown() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableDynamicFilterPushdown record component.
enableDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to enable dynamic filter pushdown.
enableIdentNormalization() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.SqlParserOptions
Returns the value of the enableIdentNormalization record component.
enableIdentNormalization(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.SqlParserOptions.Builder
Whether to normalize SQL identifiers (convert to lowercase).
enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown record component.
enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to enable join dynamic filter pushdown.
enableLeafExpressionPushdown() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableLeafExpressionPushdown record component.
enableLeafExpressionPushdown(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
When set to true, the optimizer extracts leaf expressions (such as get_field) from filter/sort/join nodes into projections closer to the leaf table scans, and pushes those projections down toward the leaf nodes.
enablePageIndex() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ParquetOptions
Returns the value of the enablePageIndex record component.
enablePageIndex(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ParquetOptions.Builder
Whether to use the page index when reading parquet files.
enablePiecewiseMergeJoin() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enablePiecewiseMergeJoin record component.
enablePiecewiseMergeJoin(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to enable piecewise merge join.
enableRecursiveCtes() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ExecutionOptions
Returns the value of the enableRecursiveCtes record component.
enableRecursiveCtes(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ExecutionOptions.Builder
Whether to enable recursive common table expressions.
enableRoundRobinRepartition() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableRoundRobinRepartition record component.
enableRoundRobinRepartition(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to use round-robin repartitioning.
enableSortPushdown() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableSortPushdown record component.
enableSortPushdown(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to enable sort pushdown optimization.
enableTopkAggregation() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableTopkAggregation record component.
enableTopkAggregation(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to enable top-K aggregation optimization.
enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown record component.
enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to enable top-K dynamic filter pushdown.
enableWindowLimits() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions
Returns the value of the enableWindowLimits record component.
enableWindowLimits(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Whether to enable window function limit optimizations.
encodeOptions() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.CsvOptions
Encodes the options as protobuf bytes (CsvOptions proto).
encodeOptions() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.ArrowReadOptions
Encodes the options (excluding schema) as protobuf bytes (ArrowOptions proto).
encodeOptions() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.CsvReadOptions
Encodes the options (excluding schema) as protobuf bytes (CsvOptions proto).
encodeOptions() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.NdJsonReadOptions
Encodes the options (excluding schema) as protobuf bytes (JsonOptions proto).
encodeOptions() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.ParquetReadOptions
Encodes the options (excluding schema) as protobuf bytes (ParquetOptions proto).
encodeOptions() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.JsonOptions
Encodes the options as protobuf bytes (JsonOptions proto).
encodeOptions() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.ParquetOptions
Encodes the options as protobuf bytes (TableParquetOptions proto).
encoding() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ParquetOptions
Returns the value of the encoding record component.
encoding() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.ParquetOptions.ParquetColumnOptions
Returns the value of the encoding record component.
encoding(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ParquetOptions.Builder
Encoding (e.g., "plain", "rle", "delta_binary_packed").
encoding(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.ParquetOptions.Builder
Set the encoding (e.g., "PLAIN", "RLE", "DELTA_BINARY_PACKED").
end() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.FileRange
Returns the end byte offset (exclusive).
end() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.CaseBuilder
Terminal: build the CASE expression without an ELSE clause (result is NULL).
end() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.Span
Returns the end location of this span.
endBound() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.WindowFrame
Returns the end boundary of the window frame.
endpoint(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.flight.FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder
Required.
endpoint(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.flight.FlightSqlTableProvider.Builder
Required.
enforceBatchSizeInJoins() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ExecutionOptions
Returns the value of the enforceBatchSizeInJoins record component.
enforceBatchSizeInJoins(boolean) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ExecutionOptions.Builder
Whether to enforce batch size limits in join operations.

Returns the value of the entries record component.

A DataFusion logical expression, corresponding to datafusion::logical_expr::Expr.
Expr.AggregateFunctionExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An aggregate function call (Expr::AggregateFunction).
Expr.AliasExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An alias expression (Expr::Alias).
Expr.BetweenExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A BETWEEN expression (Expr::Between).
Expr.BinaryExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A binary expression (Expr::BinaryExpr).
Expr.CaseExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A CASE expression (Expr::Case).
Expr.CastExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A CAST expression (Expr::Cast).
Expr.ColumnExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A column reference (Expr::Column).
Expr.GroupingSetExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A grouping set expression (Expr::GroupingSet).
Expr.InListExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IN list expression (Expr::InList).
Expr.IsFalseExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS FALSE expression (Expr::IsFalse).
Expr.IsNotFalseExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS NOT FALSE expression (Expr::IsNotFalse).
Expr.IsNotNullExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS NOT NULL expression (Expr::IsNotNull).
Expr.IsNotTrueExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS NOT TRUE expression (Expr::IsNotTrue).
Expr.IsNotUnknownExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS NOT UNKNOWN expression (Expr::IsNotUnknown).
Expr.IsNullExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS NULL expression (Expr::IsNull).
Expr.IsTrueExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS TRUE expression (Expr::IsTrue).
Expr.IsUnknownExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An IS UNKNOWN expression (Expr::IsUnknown).
Expr.LikeExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A LIKE expression (Expr::Like).
Expr.LiteralExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A literal value (Expr::Literal).
Expr.NegativeExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A negation expression (Expr::Negative).
Expr.NotExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A NOT expression (Expr::Not).
Expr.PlaceholderExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A placeholder expression (Expr::Placeholder).
Expr.ScalarFunctionExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A scalar function call (Expr::ScalarFunction).
Expr.SimilarToExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Expr.TryCastExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Expr.UnnestExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
An UNNEST expression (Expr::Unnest).
Expr.UnresolvedExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A catch-all for expression variants that cannot be fully decoded in Java.
Expr.WildcardExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A wildcard expression (Expr::Wildcard).
Expr.WindowFunctionExpr - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Returns the value of the location record component.
location(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.CatalogOptions.Builder
Location scanned to load tables for the default schema.
Location - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion
A source code location within an expression, consisting of a line and column.
Location(long, long) - Constructor for record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.Location
Creates an instance of a Location record class.
LogicalPlan - Interface in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A DataFusion logical plan node, corresponding to datafusion::logical_expr::LogicalPlan.
LogicalPlan.Aggregate - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Groups and aggregates data (GROUP BY).
LogicalPlan.Analyze - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Executes plan and prints physical plan with metrics (EXPLAIN ANALYZE).
LogicalPlan.Copy - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
COPY TO for writing plan results to files.
LogicalPlan.Ddl - Interface in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Data Definition Language operations (CREATE, DROP).
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalog - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
CREATE DATABASE statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalogSchema - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
CREATE SCHEMA statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateExternalTable - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateFunction - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
CREATE FUNCTION statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateIndex - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
CREATE INDEX statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateMemoryTable - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
CREATE TABLE AS SELECT statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateView - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
CREATE VIEW statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropCatalogSchema - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
DROP SCHEMA statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropFunction - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
DROP FUNCTION statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropTable - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
DROP TABLE statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropView - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
DROP VIEW statement.
LogicalPlan.DescribeTable - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Describes table schema (DESCRIBE command).
LogicalPlan.Distinct - Interface in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Removes duplicate rows (SELECT DISTINCT).
LogicalPlan.Distinct.All - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Plain DISTINCT referencing all selection expressions.
LogicalPlan.Distinct.On - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
PostgreSQL-style DISTINCT ON with separate control over DISTINCT'd and selected columns.
LogicalPlan.Dml - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Data Manipulation Language operations (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE).
LogicalPlan.EmptyRelation - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Produces 0 or 1 placeholder rows (empty FROM clause).
LogicalPlan.Explain - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Shows plan structure (EXPLAIN).
LogicalPlan.Extension - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Custom relational operation defined outside DataFusion.
LogicalPlan.Filter - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Filters rows that do not match a predicate (WHERE clause).
LogicalPlan.Join - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Joins two relations on join conditions.
LogicalPlan.Limit - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Skips rows then fetches a limited count (LIMIT/OFFSET).
LogicalPlan.Projection - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Evaluates an arbitrary list of expressions (SELECT with expression list).
LogicalPlan.RecursiveQuery - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Recursive CTEs (Common Table Expressions).
LogicalPlan.Repartition - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Repartitions input for parallelism.
LogicalPlan.Sort - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Sorts input per sort expressions (ORDER BY).
LogicalPlan.Statement - Interface in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
A non-relational SQL statement (SET, TRANSACTION, PREPARE, EXECUTE).
LogicalPlan.Statement.Deallocate - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
DEALLOCATE prepared statement.

Returns the table name.

Returns the table name.
table() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common.TableReference.Partial
Returns the table name.

Returns the value of the table record component.
table(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.NativeSchemaProvider
 
table(String) - Method in interface org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.SchemaProvider
Returns the table provider for the given table name.
table(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.execution.SessionContext
Creates a DataFrame for a registered table, if it exists.
table(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.flight.FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder
Registers a remote table.
tableExist(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.execution.SessionContext
Returns whether a table with the given name exists.
tableExists(String) - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.NativeSchemaProvider
 
tableExists(String) - Method in interface org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.SchemaProvider
Checks if a table exists in this schema.
tableName() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.LogicalPlan.Dml
Returns the value of the tableName record component.
tableName() - Method in record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.LogicalPlan.TableScan
Returns the value of the tableName record component.
tableNames() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.NativeSchemaProvider
 
tableNames() - Method in interface org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.SchemaProvider
Returns the names of all tables in this schema.
tablePaths() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.ListingTable
Returns the table paths.
tablePaths() - Method in class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.ListingTableConfig
Returns the table paths.
TableProvider - Interface in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog
A table provider that can be registered with a DataFusion session.
TableProviderFilterPushDown - Enum Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr
Indicates whether a filter expression can be handled by a TableProvider.
TableReference - Interface in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common
A reference to a table, which may be unqualified (bare), partially qualified (schema + table), or fully qualified (catalog + schema + table).
TableReference.Bare - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common
An unqualified table reference consisting of only a table name.
TableReference.Full - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common
A fully qualified table reference consisting of a catalog, schema, and table name.
TableReference.Partial - Record Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common
A partially qualified table reference consisting of a schema and table name.
TableReferenceConverter - Class in org.apache.arrow.datafusion
Utilities for converting between Java TableReference and protobuf representations.
TableScan(TableReference, Optional<List<Integer>>, List<Expr>, OptionalLong, Schema, LogicalPlanBridge) - Constructor for record class org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.LogicalPlan.TableScan
Creates an instance of a TableScan record class.
